name: Outgoing Logon with New Credentials
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Outgoing Logon with New Credentials
SIGMA Description: Detects logon events that specify new credentials

False positives:
- Legitimate remote administration activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Outgoing Logon with New Credentials on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Outgoing Logon with New Credentials
